name: APC_propeller_performance_files

name: method
value: Use APC high-J files to understand axial propeller CT/CP and zero-thrust/windmilling shape beyond UIUC's 5-inch experimental range. Use NASA/UMD/DLR rotor papers for edgewise high-mu and retreating-blade-stall phenomenology. Do not calibrate 5-inch FPV retreating-blade stall directly from APC axial J data.
